description: Keyed reconcile on per-item delete (§42; per-item handler live-keying). Clicking the first row's delete button calls remove(item.id) -> @items.filter drops id=1; the keyed <each> reconciles to the two surviving rows (B, C) keeping their identity.
rationale: §42 a per-item event handler closes over the item; the keyed reconciler removes exactly the deleted key and preserves the rest. Head removal leaves B, C in order.

expect.dom:
• B
  • C
